title: All you need: Youtube
description: This modpack contains all you need to make better or the best Minecraft content, offering high quality tools! In here you will find only the necessary mods making this a super lightweight modpack for all users!
body:
The **All you need: Content Creation** modpack is designed specifically for content creators, streamers, and builders who want to produce high-quality Minecraft content with smooth performance and advanced creative tools. This pack combines powerful mods for improving graphics, camera control, and building, while keeping **performance optimized** for smooth recording and streaming.

In here you will find:

- ability to **create cinematic shots** : replay mod
  
- mods give the possiblity of **different viewing angles**: freecam, camera utilities
  
- **performance boosting**: sodium, lithium, noisium, etc
  
- **proximity** chat: simple voice chat
  
- and **plenty** more...
